sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47258" key="h(misa/kion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-σάκιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σάκος</foreign> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σάκκος</foreign>) <sense id="n47258.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-sack</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σησάμων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:169" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.169</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
